# Cross-Cell Handoff

## Direction
<!-- Development Cell -> Delivery Engineering Cell, or reverse -->

## Date

## Handoff Author
<!-- Which orchestrator or role is handing off -->

---

## System Summary
<!-- Brief description of the system or component being handed off -->

## What Changed
<!-- What was built, modified, or delivered in this work -->

## Current Architecture
<!-- Relevant architecture context the receiving cell needs -->

## Deployment Assumptions
<!-- How the handing-off cell assumed this would be deployed, hosted, or released -->

## Constraints
<!-- Hard constraints the receiving cell must respect -->

## Known Shortcuts and Deferred Items
<!-- Technical debt, deferred decisions, or known gaps -->

## Open Risks
<!-- Unresolved risks relevant to the receiving cell -->

## What This Handoff Does Not Claim
<!-- Explicitly state what the handing-off cell is NOT asserting
     e.g., production readiness, cost posture, security hardening,
     operational readiness -->

## Questions for the Receiving Cell
<!-- Specific questions or evaluation requests -->

## Relevant Artifacts
<!-- Links or paths to specs, context maps, review outputs, etc. -->
